name: Crystal Ball of Telepathy
overview: A legendary crystal orb that combines scrying with telepathy and suggestion.

properties.scrying: While touching this crystal orb, you can cast Scrying (save DC 17) with it
properties.telepathy: In addition, you can communicate telepathically with creatures you can see within 30 feet of the spell's sensor

suggestion.description: You can cast Suggestion (save DC 17) through the sensor on one of those creatures
suggestion.concentration: You don't need to concentrate on this Suggestion to maintain it during its duration, but it ends if Scrying ends
suggestion.recharge: You can't cast Suggestion in this way again until the next dawn
